proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_sotorasib have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_osimertinib have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Response rate 0.174 (n=25008) on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 0.164 (n=24992) off; diff=+0.010, chi2 p=0.00341.
Response rate 0.169 (n=17544) on treatment_sotorasib vs 0.169 (n=32456) off; diff=+0.001, chi2 p=0.829.
Response rate 0.170 (n=14999) on treatment_olaparib vs 0.169 (n=35001) off; diff=+0.001, chi2 p=0.724.
Response rate 0.165 (n=14976) on treatment_osimertinib vs 0.170 (n=35024) off; diff=-0.005, chi2 p=0.179.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with egfr_mutation==1, those receiving treatment_osimertinib have a higher objective_response rate than EGFR-mutant patients not receiving treatment_osimertinib.
Among patients with egfr_mutation==0, treatment_osimertinib does not increase objective_response rate.
There is a positive interaction between egfr_mutation and treatment_osimertinib on objective_response (the benefit of osimertinib is larger in EGFR-mutant patients).

analyses.code: subset egfr_mutation==1; chi2 osimertinib vs response
analyses.result_summary: In EGFR+ subset (N=6517): response 0.164 on osimertinib (n=1973) vs 0.166 off (n=4544); diff=-0.002, p=0.87.

analyses.code: subset egfr_mutation==0; chi2 osimertinib vs response
analyses.result_summary: In EGFR- subset (N=43483): response 0.166 on osimertinib (n=13003) vs 0.171 off (n=30480); diff=-0.005, p=0.174.
Interaction log-OR (egfr_mutation x treatment_osimertinib) = +0.024, p=0.758.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with kras_g12c==1, those receiving treatment_sotorasib have a higher objective_response rate than KRAS G12C+ patients not receiving treatment_sotorasib.
Among patients with kras_g12c==0, treatment_sotorasib does not increase objective_response rate.
There is a positive interaction between kras_g12c and treatment_sotorasib on objective_response.

analyses.code: subset kras_g12c==1; chi2 sotorasib vs response
analyses.result_summary: In KRAS G12C+ subset (N=6368): response 0.175 on sotorasib (n=2246) vs 0.166 off (n=4122); diff=+0.008, p=0.43.

analyses.code: subset kras_g12c==0; chi2 sotorasib vs response
analyses.result_summary: In KRAS G12C- subset (N=43632): response 0.169 on sotorasib (n=15298) vs 0.169 off (n=28334); diff=-0.000, p=0.954.
Interaction log-OR (kras_g12c x treatment_sotorasib) = +0.059, p=0.427.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher pdl1_tps is associated with a higher objective_response rate among patients on treatment_pembrolizumab.
Higher pdl1_tps is NOT associated with response among patients off treatment_pembrolizumab.
There is a positive interaction between pdl1_tps and treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Among pembrolizumab patients (N=25008): log-OR per unit pdl1_tps = +0.454, p=7.63e-09.
Among pembrolizumab-untreated (N=24992): log-OR per unit pdl1_tps = -0.137, p=0.0904.
Interaction log-OR (pdl1_tps x treatment_pembrolizumab) = +0.591, p=1.57e-07.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab, those with tmb_high==1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with tmb_high==0.
Among patients NOT receiving treatment_pembrolizumab, tmb_high is not associated with objective_response.
There is a positive interaction between tmb_high and treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response.

analyses.code: subset pembro==1; chi2 tmb_high vs response
analyses.result_summary: Pembro+ subset: response 0.197 TMB-high (n=7111) vs 0.165 TMB-low (n=17897); diff=+0.032, p=2e-09.

analyses.code: subset pembro==0; chi2 tmb_high vs response
analyses.result_summary: Pembro- subset: response 0.167 TMB-high (n=7147) vs 0.163 TMB-low (n=17845); diff=+0.004, p=0.399.
Interaction log-OR (tmb_high x treatment_pembrolizumab) = +0.184, p=0.000415.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients on treatment_pembrolizumab, stk11_mutation==1 is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate than stk11_mutation==0 (negative predictor of immunotherapy benefit).
There is a negative interaction between stk11_mutation and treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response.
Among patients on treatment_pembrolizumab, keap1_mutation==1 is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.

analyses.code: subset pembro==1; chi2 stk11 vs response
analyses.result_summary: Pembro+ subset: response 0.158 STK11+ (n=3727) vs 0.177 STK11- (n=21281); diff=-0.019, p=0.00531.
Interaction log-OR (stk11 x pembro) = -0.211, p=0.00178.

analyses.code: subset pembro==1; chi2 keap1 vs response
analyses.result_summary: Pembro+ subset: response 0.171 KEAP1+ (n=4265) vs 0.174 KEAP1- (n=20743); diff=-0.003, p=0.625.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with brca2_mutation==1, those receiving treatment_olaparib have a higher objective_response rate than BRCA2+ patients not receiving olaparib.
There is a positive interaction between brca2_mutation and treatment_olaparib on objective_response.
Among patients with brca2_mutation==0, treatment_olaparib does not increase objective_response rate.

analyses.code: subset brca2==1; chi2 olaparib vs response
analyses.result_summary: BRCA2+ subset (N=1519): response 0.146 on olaparib (n=417) vs 0.168 off (n=1102); diff=-0.022, p=0.346.
Interaction log-OR (brca2 x olaparib) = -0.177, p=0.275.

analyses.code: subset brca2==0; chi2 olaparib vs response
analyses.result_summary: BRCA2- subset (N=48481): response 0.171 on olaparib (n=14582) vs 0.169 off (n=33899); diff=+0.002, p=0.601.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
stage_iv==1 is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate than stage_iv==0.
has_brain_mets==1 is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.

analyses.result_summary: log-OR per unit ecog_ps = -0.375, p=1.73e-93.
Response 0.154 stage IV (n=32365) vs 0.196 non-IV (n=17635); diff=-0.042, p=1.11e-33.
Response 0.144 brain mets+ (n=12584) vs 0.177 brain mets- (n=37416); diff=-0.034, p=1.99e-18.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with a HIGHER objective_response rate.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.

analyses.result_summary: log-OR per unit albumin_g_dl = +0.09067, p=0.00014.
log-OR per unit ldh_u_l = +9.808e-05, p=0.505.
log-OR per unit nlr = -0.005017, p=0.384.
log-OR per unit crp_mg_l = -0.004867, p=0.000688.
log-OR per unit weight_loss_pct_6mo = -0.03852, p=1.79e-32.

proposed_hypotheses.text: liver_mets==1 is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate than liver_mets==0.
bone_mets==1 is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate than bone_mets==0.
adrenal_mets==1 is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
pleural_effusion==1 is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.

analyses.result_summary: Response 0.173 liver_mets+ (n=7546) vs 0.168 liver_mets- (n=42454); diff=+0.005, p=0.339.
Response 0.173 bone_mets+ (n=10067) vs 0.168 bone_mets- (n=39933); diff=+0.006, p=0.183.
Response 0.165 adrenal_mets+ (n=5056) vs 0.169 adrenal_mets- (n=44944); diff=-0.005, p=0.391.
Response 0.170 pleural_effusion+ (n=7532) vs 0.169 pleural_effusion- (n=42468); diff=+0.001, p=0.893.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients on treatment_pembrolizumab, never-smokers have a LOWER objective_response rate than current/former smokers.
histology=="squamous" is associated with a different objective_response rate than histology=="adenocarcinoma".
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with a HIGHER objective_response rate among patients on treatment_pembrolizumab (more neoantigens).

analyses.code: subset pembro==1; chi2 never-smoker vs response
analyses.result_summary: Pembro+ subset: response 0.164 never-smokers (n=3740) vs 0.176 ever-smokers (n=21268); diff=-0.011, p=0.104.
Response 0.174 squamous (n=13901) vs 0.167 adeno (n=36099); diff=+0.007, p=0.0784.
Pembro+ subset: log-OR per pack-year = -0.0006995, p=0.32.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with a different objective_response rate.
sex_female==1 is associated with a different objective_response rate than sex_female==0.
Among patients with egfr_mutation==1, sex_female==1 patients have a HIGHER objective_response rate.

analyses.result_summary: log-OR per year of age = +0.000514, p=0.668.

analyses.code: subset egfr==1; chi2 sex_female vs response
analyses.result_summary: EGFR+ subset: response 0.165 female (n=2939) vs 0.165 male (n=3578); diff=-0.001, p=0.96.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.

log-OR per unit dyspnea_grade = -0.00737, p=0.49.
log-OR per unit pain_nrs = +0.001268, p=0.776.
log-OR per unit appetite_loss_grade = -0.01043, p=0.352.

interstitial_lung_disease_history==1 patients have a LOWER objective_response rate.
chronic_kidney_disease==1 is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.

log-OR per prior line = -0.01228, p=0.244.

proposed_hypotheses.text: alk_fusion==1 patients have a different objective_response rate than alk_fusion==0 patients.
tp53_mutation==1 is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
msi_high==1 patients have a HIGHER objective_response rate.
race_ethnicity=="asian" patients have a HIGHER prevalence of egfr_mutation than non-Asian patients.
race_ethnicity is associated with objective_response rate.
rural_residence==1 is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
insurance_type=="uninsured" is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate vs private.

ros1_fusion==1 patients have a different objective_response rate than ros1_fusion==0 patients.
ret_fusion==1 patients have a different objective_response rate than ret_fusion==0 patients.
met_exon14_skipping==1 patients have a different objective_response rate than met_exon14_skipping==0 patients.
her2_amplification==1 patients have a different objective_response rate than her2_amplification==0 patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with a HIGHER objective_response rate.
Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
Higher platelets_k_ul is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients on treatment_pembrolizumab, the subgroup with tmb_high==1 AND stk11_mutation==0 has a higher objective_response rate than the union of the other (tmb_high, stk11_mutation) subgroups on pembrolizumab.
There is a positive 3-way interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab, tmb_high, and (1 - stk11_mutation) on objective_response.

analyses.code: subset pembro==1; compare tmb_high==1 & stk11==0 vs all others

analyses.result_summary: 3-way interaction log-OR (pembro x tmb_high x [1-stk11]) = +0.311, p=9.26e-10.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the EGFR+ subgroup on treatment_osimertinib, never-smokers have a HIGHER objective_response rate than ever-smokers.
Within the EGFR+ subgroup on treatment_osimertinib, sex_female==1 patients have a HIGHER objective_response rate than males.
Within the KRAS G12C+ subgroup on treatment_sotorasib, smoking_pack_years has no association with objective_response.

analyses.code: subset egfr==1 & osimertinib==1; chi2 never-smoker vs response
analyses.result_summary: EGFR+ on osimertinib: response 0.153 never-smokers (n=1153) vs 0.179 ever-smokers (n=820); diff=-0.027, p=0.13.

analyses.code: subset egfr==1 & osimertinib==1; chi2 sex_female vs response
analyses.result_summary: EGFR+ on osimertinib: response 0.155 female (n=903) vs 0.171 male (n=1070); diff=-0.016, p=0.371.
KRAS G12C+ on sotorasib: log-OR per pack-year = +0.001203, p=0.573.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one of the 23 SNPs (snp_*) is associated with objective_response after Bonferroni correction.
snp_rs1045642 is associated with objective_response.
snp_rs429358 is associated with objective_response.

analyses.code: for each snp_*: chi2 vs response; compare to Bonferroni 0.05/k

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable logistic regression of objective_response on key clinical and biomarker predictors, the matched-treatment interactions (egfr*osimertinib, kras_g12c*sotorasib, brca2*olaparib, pdl1*pembrolizumab, tmb*pembrolizumab) all have positive coefficients and p<0.05.
In the same multivariable model, ecog_ps and the stk11*pembrolizumab interaction both have NEGATIVE coefficients and p<0.05.

analyses.code: multivariable logit(response ~ clinical + biomarkers + treatments + matched-interactions)
analyses.result_summary: Matched-treatment interaction log-ORs: _egfr_x_osi=+0.027 (p=0.727); _kras_x_sot=+0.063 (p=0.405); _brca_x_ola=-0.156 (p=0.341); _pdl1_x_pem=+0.593 (p=1.81e-07); _tmb_x_pem=+0.173 (p=0.000968).

analyses.code: same MV model — extract ecog_ps and stk11*pembro coefficients
analyses.result_summary: Negative-direction terms: ecog_ps=-0.380 (p=3.41e-95); _stk11_x_pem=-0.203 (p=0.00288).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher spo2_pct is associated with a HIGHER objective_response rate.
Higher heart_rate_bpm is associated with a LOWER objective_response rate.
Higher bmi is associated with a HIGHER objective_response rate.
Among pembrolizumab-treated patients, higher bmi is associated with a HIGHER objective_response rate (immunotherapy obesity paradox).

analyses.result_summary: log-OR per unit spo2_pct = +0.001607, p=0.789.
log-OR per unit heart_rate_bpm = -0.000347, p=0.727.
log-OR per unit bmi = +0.002235, p=0.35.
Pembro+ subset: log-OR per BMI unit = +0.00386, p=0.248.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The absolute response benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab (rate on vs off) increases monotonically across pdl1_tps quartiles (q3 - q0 > 0).
In the lowest pdl1_tps quartile, treatment_pembrolizumab does not significantly increase objective_response.
In the highest pdl1_tps quartile, treatment_pembrolizumab significantly increases objective_response.

analyses.code: pdl1 quartiles: per-quartile chi2 of pembrolizumab vs response
pdl1 q0; chi2 pembrolizumab vs response
analyses.result_summary: PD-L1 q0: pembro vs no-pembro response diff=+0.002, p=0.761.

analyses.code: pdl1 q3; chi2 pembrolizumab vs response
analyses.result_summary: PD-L1 q3: pembro vs no-pembro response diff=+0.047, p=5.82e-12.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A multivariable logistic regression including matched-treatment interactions, key biomarkers, ECOG, stage, NLR, albumin, LDH, and stk11*pembrolizumab achieves a higher AUC than a treatments-only model on the same data.

In the full multivariable model adjusting for matched-treatment interactions, treatment_pembrolizumab still has a positive log-OR with p<0.05 (i.e. response benefit at PD-L1=0, TMB-low, STK11=0 baseline).

In the full multivariable model adjusting for matched-treatment interactions, the main coefficient on treatment_osimertinib (the effect in EGFR-negative patients) is approximately zero (|log-OR|<0.1) and not significant.

analyses.code: compare AUC of full multivariable model vs treatments-only logit
analyses.result_summary: AUC full model = 0.5947; AUC treatments-only = 0.5111; delta = +0.0836.
adjusted log-OR for treatment_pembrolizumab (with PD-L1, TMB, STK11 interactions in model) = -0.130, p=0.00537.

analyses.code: full model — main coefficient on treatment_osimertinib (= effect when egfr=0)
analyses.result_summary: adjusted log-OR for treatment_osimertinib in EGFR-negative patients = -0.037, p=0.194.
